$comment: Curated static example authored from the inventory. It is not generated by a runtime golden-flow execution.

transitions.cardMovement: Dragging a card onto a column, or using its move control, changes which workflow status owns the card and updates every column count.
transitions.boardControls: Search and the column selector narrow the visible cards; an empty result offers Clear filters.
transitions.workItemCreation: New work item opens a Dialog requiring a non-empty title; submitting adds a local card to the chosen column.
transitions.workItemEditing: The manage-items panel's Edit control opens the same Dialog pre-filled with the card's fields, including its column; saving updates or moves the card.
transitions.workItemDeletion: The manage-items panel's Delete control removes a card from the board immediately.
transitions.boardPersistence: Every move, edit, deletion, and addition is saved to localStorage; reloading the page restores that saved board. Reset board discards it and restores the seed columns.
